hero_headline: A science-supported head spa ritual, designed for Salon by the Sea.

why_you_bullets: Salon by the Sea's revenue tier signals the capacity to integrate a luxury head spa system.

roi_copy: At ~40 clients each week, MaRe Eye moves you from the industry-standard 3% retail conversion to 40%+. Projected additional annual revenue: $187000.
